title: Nested SELECT expression with JOIN causes outer WHERE to be disregarded sometimes
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (a INTEGER, b INTEGER, c VARCHAR(10));
INSERT INTO t1 (a, b, c) VALUES (1, 3, 'test1');
CREATE TABLE t2 (c INTEGER, d FLOAT, e DATE);
INSERT INTO t2 (c, d, e) VALUES (1, 4.5, DATE('2023-01-01'));
SELECT * FROM t1 INNER JOIN t2 ON t1.a = t2.c WHERE t1.a IS NOT NULL AND t1.b < 5;
key_bug_features: Nested SELECT with JOIN disregards outer WHERE clause
